aside.jobTitle: Josefine Eriksson, Fullstack Developer & Graphic/Web Designer

fullstack.title: Fullstack Developer & Graphic Designer
fullstack.description: Combining technology and design to create complete solutions – from modern code and user-friendly UX/UI interfaces to visual identities with logos, banners, and printed materials. Focus on professional and engaging solutions that strengthen brands and services.

frontend.title: Frontend Developer React Next.js Material UI
frontend.description: Internship (LIA) - hitract.se is a platform for students and student unions. Working with frontend development in React, Next.js with Material UI based on Figma designs from UX/UI designers.

fullstack.title: Fullstack - React, Next.js, TypeScript
fullstack.description: React, Next.js, HTML, CSS, JavaScript/TypeScript, Prisma, SQL, Tailwind CSS, Bootstrap, PostgreSQL, Git/GitHub, AI, Node.js

aboutMe.title: About me
aboutMe.p1: My name is Josefine, I'm 40 years old and live in Mjölby with my two teenage daughters.
aboutMe.p2: I'm a driven person who thrives on taking on new challenges. Learning new things and improving what I already know is something I truly value – both professionally and personally.
aboutMe.p3: My interest in IT goes back to 2007. Already then I was drawn to digital creation – from designing blogs and banners to writing simple scripts and running my own web store and fyndiq.se with self-designed products. That curiosity has never disappeared.
aboutMe.p4: Since then, I've built a solid foundation in HTML, CSS, and JavaScript, and have recently trained as a fullstack developer. Through my ongoing internship (LIA) at hitract.se, I've gained valuable practical experience in modern web development.
aboutMe.p5: I run the website kodochdesign.se where I take on smaller projects, but my main goal is to find employment in fullstack or frontend development where I can grow in my professional role and contribute to innovative projects. I'm aiming for a start in the spring.
aboutMe.p6: When I'm not coding, I enjoy recharging in nature, playing piano, crafting, or relaxing with computer games or piano. I value the balance between performing and recovering.
